DFIntBandwidthMetricsPointsThrottle.mechanism: Limits the amount of data collected on bandwidth metrics to reduce server load.
DFIntBandwidthMetricsPointsThrottle.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by optimizing performance and reducing lag.

FFlagRefactorPeoplePage8_IXP.mechanism: Updates the code structure for the People page to improve performance.
FFlagRefactorPeoplePage8_IXP.purpose: Provides a faster and smoother experience when viewing friends and users.

FFlagLuauTidyTypeUtils_Staged.mechanism: Enhances the type-checking tools in Luau for better code clarity.
FFlagLuauTidyTypeUtils_Staged.purpose: Helps developers write cleaner and more efficient scripts, leading to better games.

FFlagAppChatEnableConversationUserTileAv.mechanism: Adds user avatars to conversation tiles in the chat interface.
FFlagAppChatEnableConversationUserTileAv.purpose: Makes it easier for players to identify who they are chatting with.

FFlagEnableOTAChannels_Staged.mechanism: Introduces new channels for Over-The-Air updates.
FFlagEnableOTAChannels_Staged.purpose: Allows players to receive updates and new features more quickly and seamlessly.

FFlagFmodLockFreeDspGetIdle_Staged.mechanism: Implements a more efficient audio processing method without locking resources.
FFlagFmodLockFreeDspGetIdle_Staged.purpose: Improves sound performance in games, leading to a better audio experience.

FFlagSduiLoggerRemoveContext.mechanism: Removes unnecessary context data from the logging system for SDUI.
FFlagSduiLoggerRemoveContext.purpose: Improves performance and reduces clutter in logs, making it easier for developers to troubleshoot issues.

FFlagEnableInspectAndBuyV2RootFlag2_IXP.mechanism: Activates a new version of the inspect and buy feature for items in the catalog.
FFlagEnableInspectAndBuyV2RootFlag2_IXP.purpose: Enhances the shopping experience by providing a more streamlined and user-friendly interface for players to view and purchase items.
